popularStory.headline: Humbert II de Savoie (1065-1103)
popularStory.description: Humbert II de Maurienne ou dit plus couramment Humbert II de Savoie, dit le Renforcé (parfois le Gros), né après 1065 et mort le 14 octobre 1103 à Salins en Tarentaise, est le sixième comte en Maurien …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Humbert II de Savoie於1066年6月6日出生在法國布格o-達迪喬時，他的父親Amédée II de Savoie18歲，母親Jeanne de Genève17歲。他於1090年與Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1103年10月19日在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊薩林勒-黑斯享年37歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊莫u爾斯。

法国努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humbert II de Savoie于1066年6月6日出生在法国布格o-達迪喬时，他的父亲Amédée II de Savoie18岁，母亲Jeanne de Genève17岁。他于1090年与Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1103年10月19日在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊薩林勒-黑斯享年37岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊莫u爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Humbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. However, it was not common in Britain in the Middle Ages, and has always had a Continental flavour. It was used by Vladimir Nabokov for the name of the demented pederast, Humbert Humbert , who is the narrator in his novel Lolita ( 1955 ).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Humbert II de Savoie was born on 6 June 1066, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Amédée II de Savoie, was 18 and his mother, Jeanne de Genève, was 17. He married Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté in 1090, in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 October 1103, in Salins-les-Thermes, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 37, and was buried in Moûtiers, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humbert II de Savoie est né le 6 juin 1066, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Amédée II de Savoie, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Genève, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté en 1090, à Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 octobre 1103, à Salins-les-Thermes, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Moûtiers, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humbert II de Savoie am 6. Juni 1066 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Amédée II de Savoie 18 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Genève 17. Er hat 1090 in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Oktober 1103 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Salins-les-Thermes, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Moûtiers, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humbert II de Savoie è nato il il 6 giugno 1066 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Amédée II de Savoie, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Genève, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté nel 1090, nel Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1103, nel Salins-les-Thermes, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Moûtiers, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Humbert II de Savoieが1066年6月6日にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Amédée II de Savoieは18歳，母Jeanne de Genèveは17歳であった。1090年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリーでGisèle de Bourgogne-Comtéと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1103年10月19日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイサリンス-レス-スエルメスで37歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイモuティエルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humbert II de Savoie(이)가 1066년 6월 6일 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amédée II de Savoie(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Genève(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1090년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에서 Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1103년 10월 19일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 살린스-레스-더메스에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 모u티어스에 묻혔다.

mn.6 de junho de 1066–19 de outubro de 1103: 1066 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 6–1103 оны Аравдугаар сарын 19

pt.6 de junho de 1066–19 de outubro de 1103: 6 de junho de 1066–19 de outubro de 1103
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humbert II de Savoie nasceu em 6 de junho de 1066, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Amédée II de Savoie, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Genève, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté em 1090, em Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1103, em Salins-les-Thermes, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Moûtiers, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humbert II de Savoie родился 6 июня 1066 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Amédée II de Savoie было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Genève, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté в 1090 г. в местности чамбeри, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 октября 1103 г. в местности салинс-лес-тирмесь, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности моuтиирс, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.6 de junho de 1066–19 de outubro de 1103: 6 de junio de 1066–19 de octubre de 1103
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humbert II de Savoie nació el 6 de junio de 1066, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Amédée II de Savoie, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Genève, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté en 1090, en Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1103, en Salins-les-Thermes, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Moûtiers, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
